concerns.analysis: The header for section 'PE-17 – Alternate Work Site' is visually duplicated. In the source PDF, this section spans pages 11 and 12. In the converted HTML, the header appears once at the start of the section and is then repeated in the middle of sub-point 'd', corresponding to where the page break occurred in the original PDF.

concerns.analysis: The overall visual quality is high, but there is a noticeable inconsistency in list formatting caused by the page-break handling. In the 'PE-17' section, sub-point 'i' uses a Roman numeral, but after the duplicated header, the subsequent sub-points (which were ii, iii, iv, v, vi in the source) switch to Arabic numerals (1, 2, 3, 4, 5). This inconsistent formatting degrades the polish of the document.
